name: youtube-player
title: YouTube Player
description: Full YouTube watch-page UI. 16:9 player frame + scrubber bar with red progress + play/pause + fullscreen + duration display + title + channel row with subscribe button + action bar (like via PressLike + share) + description block + optional recommendations rail. Two layouts: 'embed' (compact, fits iPhone-chassis) and 'desktop' (player + 380px recommendations rail, fits MacBook-chassis). Includes AfYoutubeGradientPoster fallback when no real video poster is available. Composable: video-frame is a slot, recommendations are passed as data.
